title: batrachium sceleratum
intro: Batrachium sceleratum, also known as American frog-bit or green bit holus, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Podostemaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Batrachium sceleratum include its ability to reduce swelling and ease pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Batrachium sceleratum often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to respiratory problems.
